remarks: Oversized and updated one bedroom, one bathroom in luxury midrise bldg in the heart of downtown! Includes water/trash/sewer/garage parking! Gourmet kitchen w/ high end cabinetry/ stone countertops, chef's appliances- stove, dishwasher, microwave, refrigerator, breakfast bar that opens into sunfilled living area w/ walls of glass- floor to ceiling windows! Gleaming hardwood floors, fresh paint, central air conditioning. Modern bathroom w/ tub, large bedroom w/ double closet with 2 walls of floor to ceiling windows! Professional gym, roof top decks w/ fabulous views/grills/patio furniture. Package reception, 24 hr emergency maintenance, clubroom w/ pool table, work from home area. 1 garage space is included, pets welcome! Walk to train, shops, nightlife, minutes to highways and beaches!
